theme: the Stories & Heroes model + multi-org — turn the single-org seeder into a declarative engine where one stack.stories.yaml seeds MULTIPLE orgs, each with a thriving/struggling/manager hero trio at vantage-appropriate fidelity. blueprint.EffectiveStories() normalizes a multi-story blueprint OR a legacy single-org one into a uniform resolved-story slice (byte-identical legacy ids — one code path, the regression-containment seam); per-story OrgID/orgClerkID thread through all 8 seeders; the first story keeps the Clerkenstein default org (single-identity until M37) + later stories get deterministic StoryOrgID; PersonaSeeder scaled to the 2-story x 3-hero roster (Cervato {Maya/Tom/Dan} + Solvantis {Sara/Nick/Leah}); the trajectory logic (thriving=dense/rising/under-claim vs struggling=sparse/low/over-claim); the jobroleref.go runtime job-role resolver (real replayed J- node-ids, never fabricated); supporting-population fidelity (ramped joined_at + deduped real names). Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.

go_test_funcs.counting_method: 347 = top-level 'func Test...' across all _test.go minus the 2 //go:build integration funcs; 425 = '=== RUN' lines (incl t.Run subtests) from go test -count=1 ./... -v. Integration tests (TestIntegration_VerifiedSkillChain + TestIntegration_MultiOrgStories) are opt-in behind //go:build integration + STACKSEED_IT_DSN — excluded from the count.
go_test_funcs.note: M35 added the multi-org cross-seeder tests, the jobroleref resolver tests, the trajectory-helper unit tests, the stories[] blueprint tests, + the close-phase skillPool negative-index regression test (+1). The harden passes drove blueprint 90.9->100% and seeders 95.6->98.0%.

coverage.note: Residual sub-100% seeders blocks are uniform DB-write COPY-error wrappers inside seeder Seed() methods (structurally identical to the persona flush() paths M34 covers) — defensive, not gaps.

benchmarks: n/a — no performance-sensitive hot path; the seeder is DB-IO-bound bulk COPY, no benchmark target.
flake_gate: PASS — 5/5 sequential shuffled (-shuffle=on) runs of blueprint + seeders, 0 flakes. Plus the full-suite -race run green. Deterministic by construction (seeded hashes, no time/random).
supply_chain: GREEN — stdlib-only posture preserved; 0 third-party Go deps added by M35.
